mapper.sql: id, wallet_no, customer_no, biz_type, balance, frozen_balance, total_recharge, total_withdraw, total_consume, status, version, balance_hash, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM ds_wallet WHERE customer_no = #{customerNo} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE ds_wallet SET status = #{status}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE ds_wallet SET balance = balance + #{amount},
total_recharge = total_recharge + #{amount},
version = version + 1, balance_hash = #{balanceHash}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE wallet_no = #{walletNo} AND version = #{version} AND status = 'ACTIVE'

UPDATE ds_wallet SET balance = balance - #{amount},
total_withdraw = total_withdraw + #{amount},
total_consume = total_consume + #{amount},
version = version + 1, balance_hash = #{balanceHash}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE wallet_no = #{walletNo} AND version = #{version} AND balance >= #{amount} AND status = 'ACTIVE'

UPDATE ds_wallet SET frozen_balance = frozen_balance - #{amount},
total_withdraw = total_withdraw + #{amount},
total_consume = total_consume + #{amount},
version = version + 1, balance_hash = #{balanceHash}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE wallet_no = #{walletNo} AND version = #{version} AND frozen_balance >= #{amount} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
UPDATE ds_wallet SET balance = #{balance}, balance_hash = #{balanceHash}, version = version + 1, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE wallet_no = #{walletNo} AND version = #{version}
